scripts.setup: bun run wasm:build && bun run wasm:transpile
scripts.build: bun run setup && bun build ./src/index.html --outdir=dist --sourcemap --target=browser --minify --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --env='BUN_PUBLIC_*' && bun run wasm:move
scripts.wasm:sanity-check: bun run wasm:build && cd wasm && sh ./sanity-check.sh
scripts.wasm:transpile: bun run wasm:jco:types && bun run wasm:jco:transpile
scripts.wasm:jco:types: rm -rf generated && bun run jco types -o generated ./wasm/wit
